title: Odběr vzorků fytobentosu a makrozoobentosu tekoucích vod pro analýzu DNA
author: Urbánková, Pavla
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This methodology describes standardized procedures for the sampling, preservation, and storage of phytobenthos and macrozoobenthos in running waters for DNA-based analyses, particularly DNA metabarcoding. 
 The protocol builds on established national monitoring methods and integrates recent recommendations and technical standards for benthic sampling adapted to molecular analyses. It ensures sample quality, minimizes DNA contamination, and maintains compatibility with downstream workflows. The methodology is designed for easy implementation into standard operating procedures (SOPs) used in aquatic biomonitoring in the Czech Republic. 
 This methodology was developed within a project supported by the   Technologická agentura ČR   under the SIGMA programme.
